data.title: Novartis Rhapsido® receives European Commission approval as first oral targeted treatment for chronic spontaneous urticaria
data.description: Novartis reported today that the European Commission has granted approval for Rhapsido ® (remibrutinib) for chronic spontaneous urticaria (CSU) in adults who have not responded sufficiently to H1-antihistamine therapy. This marks the first time an oral targeted therapy has been greenlit for CSU treatment, providing a novel treatment method. Rhapsido is to be taken twice daily in pill form, with no need for regular lab monitoring.

data.title: SoftBank Corp. and TOPPAN Holdings Develop Lightweight, Durable Skin for Solar HAPS Aircraft Wings
data.description: The potential of skin's resilience to stratospheric conditions, including intense UV radiation and extremely low temperatures, has paved the way for extended High-Altitude Pseudo-Satellite (HAPS) missions. In Tokyo on April 27, 2026, SoftBank Corp. (TYO: 9434) under the leadership of President & CEO Junichi Miyakawa, and TOPPAN Holdings Inc. (TYO: 7911) collaborated on this breakthrough development. This partnership signifies a significant step towards prolonging HAPS operations, enhancing the efficiency and capability of such missions.

data.title: Appcast Releases 2026 U.K. Recruitment Marketing Benchmark Report as Labour Market Softens and Hiring Costs Decline
data.description: In London, the labor market in the U.K. is undergoing a cooling phase, leading to notable impacts on hiring expenses, candidate actions, and job advertisement effectiveness. To assist human resource professionals in adjusting to this environment, Appcast has unveiled its latest study, the 2026 U.K. Recruitment Marketing Benchmark Report. This report is based on the analysis of 3.6 million clicks on recruitment advertisements and 880,000 job applications received by over 190 U.K. employers. It offers valuable data-driven insights and benchmarks for talent acquisition leaders to make informed decisions.

data.title: Kitron: Dividend payment of NOK 0.70 today
data.description: In a recent report, it was outlined that a total of 2,500 individuals were affected by the data breach. The incident occurred due to a cyberattack on the company's system, which led to unauthorized access to sensitive information. The company has assured that steps are being taken to enhance cybersecurity measures and prevent such breaches in the future. Additionally, authorities have been alerted, and an investigation is currently ongoing to identify the perpetrators behind the attack. The impacted individuals have been advised to monitor their accounts closely and report any suspicious activities.此回報指出，共有 2,500 人受到資料外洩事件的影響。該事件是由於公司系統遭受駭客攻擊，導致對敏感資訊的未經授權訪問。公司已保證正在採取措施加強網絡安全措施，以防止將來發生此類事件。此外，當局已獲報警，目前正在進行調查以查明幕後攻擊者。受影響的人士已被建議密切監控其帳戶，並報告任何可疑活動。

data.title: Aktsiaselts Infortar own share acquisition transactions
data.description: Between April 20th and April 24th, 2026, Aktsiaselts Infortar bought back its own shares on the Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange.

data.title: Biotalys Achieves First U.S. State Registration for EVOCA in Florida
data.description: Biotalys has recently achieved a significant milestone as their innovative biofungicide, EVOCA™, obtained state registration in Florida, becoming the first AGROBODY™ biocontrol to be approved by a US state. This development highlights the growing acceptance and recognition of the product's effectiveness in the market.

data.title: Santhera Receives Positive CHMP Opinion to Expand AGAMREE® (vamorolone) Use in Pediatric DMD Patients Aged Two and Older in the EU
data.description: In Pratteln, Switzerland, on April 27, 2026, Santhera Pharmaceuticals shared that the Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use (CHMP) of the European Medicines Agency (EMA) has recommended extending the marketing authorization for AGAMREE® (vamorolone) to cover treating Duchenne muscular dystrophy (DMD) patients from 2 years of age. This positive opinion is a significant step in potentially broadening the scope of approved usage for this drug.

data.title: iCAUR Brings Right-Hand-Drive V27 to Beijing Auto Show 2026, Marking a Key Step in Its Global Expansion
data.description: iCAUR unveils the V27 model designed for right-hand-drive markets at the 2026 Beijing Auto Show. This move signifies the company's commitment to expanding globally by tailoring products to specific regions and reaching a wider international audience.

data.title: Aave requests 30K ETH transfer from Kelp exploiter to 'DeFi United'. $21M already raised for relief; $215M more possible with governance approval.
data.description: The relief effort known as "DeFi United" has received over $21 million in contributions thus far. Additionally, there is a possibility of allocating an additional $215 million if specific governance proposals are approved.
